publicSummary.en: Cheapest option — trolleybus 103 to Čobanija, then a short walk to Dalmatinska 6.
publicSummary.ru: Самый дешёвый вариант — троллейбус 103 до Čobanija, затем короткая прогулка до Dalmatinska 6.

publicPreview.en: Walk about 14 minutes (1 km) out of the airport terminal to the 'Dobrinja škola' trolleybus stop.
publicPreview.ru: Walk about 14 minutes (1 km) out of the airport terminal to the 'Dobrinja škola' trolleybus stop.

publicText.en: Take trolleybus №103 directly to the city center. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only). Remember to validate your ticket inside!
publicText.ru: Take trolleybus №103 directly to the city center. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only). Remember to validate your ticket inside!

publicWalkToHostel.en: Cross the bridge over the river, turn left onto Main Street, and walk towards Dalmatinska 6.
publicWalkToHostel.ru: Cross the bridge over the river, turn left onto Main Street, and walk towards Dalmatinska 6.

taxiCost.en: The fair price from the airport to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).
taxiCost.ru: The fair price from the airport to the hostel is around {minKM}–{maxKM} KM ({minEUR}–{maxEUR} €).

hint.en: EU routes, Croatia, Federation of BiH
hint.ru: EU routes, Croatia, Federation of BiH

publicSummary.en: Fastest option — tram 1 to Pošta stop, hostel is around the corner.
publicSummary.ru: Самый быстрый вариант — трамвай 1 до остановки Pošta, хостел за углом.

publicPreview.en: Exit the bus station and walk 1 minute (78 m) forward to the 'Željezniчка stanica' tram loop right on the square.
publicPreview.ru: Exit the bus station and walk 1 minute (78 m) forward to the 'Željezniчка stanica' tram loop right on the square.

publicText.en: Take Tram №1 directly to the hostel area. Tickets are 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only).
publicText.ru: Take Tram №1 directly to the hostel area. Tickets are 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver (cash only).

publicGetOffAt.en: Get off at 'Pošta' stop. You will see a massive Post Office building.
publicGetOffAt.ru: Get off at 'Pošta' stop. You will see a massive Post Office building.

publicWalkToHostel.en: Walk up towards Dalmatinska 6 — we are right around the corner.
publicWalkToHostel.ru: Walk up towards Dalmatinska 6 — we are right around the corner.

taxiCost.en: A short ride to the hostel. The price should not exceed 7–10 KM.
taxiCost.ru: A short ride to the hostel. The price should not exceed 7–10 KM.

publicSummary.en: Direct route across the entity border to Čobanija, then walk to the hostel.
publicSummary.ru: Прямой маршрут через границу сущностей до Čobanija, затем пешком до хостела.

publicPreview.en: Walk about 7 minutes (500 m) from the East Sarajevo station building to the 'Dobrinja' terminal trolleybus stop.
publicPreview.ru: Walk about 7 minutes (500 m) from the East Sarajevo station building to the 'Dobrinja' terminal trolleybus stop.

publicText.en: Take trolleybus №103 towards 'Trg Austrije'. Tickets are 1.80 KM in the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash. Please validate it immediately.
publicText.ru: Take trolleybus №103 towards 'Trg Austrije'. Tickets are 1.80 KM in the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash. Please validate it immediately.

publicWalkToHostel.en: Cross the bridge over the Miljacka river and walk straight towards Dalmatinska street.
publicWalkToHostel.ru: Cross the bridge over the Miljacka river and walk straight towards Dalmatinska street.

taxiCost.en: A convenient way to cross the entity border directly to the hostel door. Average cost is around 15 KM.
taxiCost.ru: A convenient way to cross the entity border directly to the hostel door. Average cost is around 15 KM.

publicSummary.en: Direct tram from the square to Pošta, ~3 min walk to the door.
publicSummary.ru: Прямой трамвай с площади до Pošta, ~3 мин пешком до входа.

publicPreview.en: Exit the railway station building. The tram loop is right in front of you on the main square (1 min walk).
publicPreview.ru: Exit the railway station building. The tram loop is right in front of you on the main square (1 min walk).

publicText.en: Take Tram №1 towards 'Baščaršija'. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash.
publicText.ru: Take Tram №1 towards 'Baščaršija'. Tickets cost 1.80 KM at the kiosk or 2.00 KM from the driver in cash.

taxiCost.en: The hostel is close, so the fair ride price on the taximeter is around 7–10 KM.
taxiCost.ru: The hostel is close, so the fair ride price on the taximeter is around 7–10 KM.

taxiStand.en: Take a taxi only from the official stands on the street. Never agree to fixed high prices offered by drivers waiting right by the bus platforms.
taxiStand.ru: Take a taxi only from the official stands on the street. Never agree to fixed high prices offered by drivers waiting right by the bus platforms.

taxiMeter.en: Make sure the driver clears the meter and starts it at the official base rate (2.50 KM).
taxiMeter.ru: Make sure the driver clears the meter and starts it at the official base rate (2.50 KM).

busClarification.en: Which direction or country did you arrive from?
busClarification.ru: Which direction or country did you arrive from?
